case_title: CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY CO., INC. VS WEST COAST CONTRACTING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $389.14 FILED BY CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY CO., INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST CONTRACTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY CO., INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST COAST CONTRACTING $389.14 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $404.14 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
